creator: coppolajj@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Sean Farley from comment #1)
So I think I have tried the suggestion with the following setup:

ifconfig_em0="up"
ifconfig_iwn0="ether 00:1c:25:9d:ec:60"
wlans_iwn0="wlan0"
ifconfig_wlan0="WPA"
cloned_interfaces="lagg0"
ifconfig_lagg0="laggproto failover laggport em0 laggport wlan0 DHCP"

This is very similar to the setup from the handbook, 30.7. Link Aggregation and Failover, Example 30.3 (https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/handbook/network-aggregation.html).

But this causes bigger problems, like panic messages ("iwn_panicked: controller panicked, iv_state = 5; restarting") and wireless never working, but perhaps I am not setting it up properly???

Here's the log from boot:
